Name: Cus's Cutlasses
Description: A mysterious group of pirates who don't seem to behave much like pirates. Noone knows who they are or why they deploy units in groups of 5 instead of 4 as they do not seem to be part of any known Clan.
ReputationStatements: Even pirates occasionally requires the services of mercenaries, Commander. We will look highly upon you, should you aid us.

MissionSuccessStatements: Cus's Cutlasses congratulate you on your successful mission, mercenary. We are pleased you've been able to assist us so thoroughly.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: It seems apparent that while you failed to achieve our goals, you engaged the enemy for as long as you were able. Better luck next time, Commander. May the Spirit of Ker-I mean the Inner Sphere be with you.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Far be it from pirates to reprimand you in matters of warfare, Commander, but… your performance on that operation was positively abysmal. We roundly condemn your inadequacies.
